revision.text:
{{Short description|Shinto shrine}} {{unreferenced|date=December 2021}}
'''Uramachi Shinmeigū''' (浦町神明宮, ''Uramachi Shinmeigū'') is a [[Shinto]] shrine located in [[Aomori]], [[Aomori Prefecture]], Japan. It enshrines three major [[kami]]: [[Amaterasu]] (天照大神), Omiyanome no kami (大宮能賣神), and [[Sarutahiko Ōkami]] (猿田彦神). The shrine is located at 〒030-0823 Aomori-ken, Aomori-shi, Hashimoto 2-7-8. Its major annual festival is on June 16.
== See also == *[[List of Shinto shrines in Japan]]
== External links == *[https://yaokami.jp/1020015/ Yaokami listing]
{{Shinto shrine}}
{{coord|40.82116|140.75108|format=dms|type:landmark_region:JP|display=title}}
[[en:Uramachi Shinmeigū]]]]
[[en:Uramachi Shinmeigū]]]]
[[en:Uramachi Shinmeigū]]]]
[[en:Uramachi Shinmeigū]] [[en:Uramachi Shinmeigū]]]]
[[en:Uramachi Shinmeigū]]]]
[[en:Uramachi Shinmeigū]] [[ja:浦町神明宮]] [[en:Uramachi Shinmeigū]] [[en:Uramachi Shinmeigū]]

[[sn:Uramachi Shinmeigū]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Uramachi Shinmeigū]]
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:31, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:17, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{Short description|Shinto shrine}}
{{unreferenced|date=December 2021}}

'''Uramachi Shinmeigū''' (浦町神明宮, ''Uramachi Shinmeigū'') is a [[Shinto]] shrine located in [[:en:Aomori|Aomori]], [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]], Japan. It enshrines three major [[kami]]: [[Amaterasu]] (天照大神), Omiyanome no kami (大宮能賣神), and [[Sarutahiko Ōkami]] (猿田彦神). The shrine is located at 〒030-0823 Aomori-ken, Aomori-shi, Hashimoto 2-7-8. Its major annual festival is on June 16.

== See also ==
*[[List of Shinto shrines in Japan]]

== External links ==
*[https://yaokami.jp/1020015/ Yaokami listing]

'''Uramachi Shinmeigū''' (浦町神明宮, ''Uramachi Shinmeigū'') is a [[Shinto]] shrine located in [[:en:Aomori|Aomori]], [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori Prefecture]], Japan. It enshrines three major [[kami]]: [[Amaterasu]] (天照大神), Omiyanome no kami (大宮能賣神), and [[Sarutahiko Ōkami]] (猿田彦神). The shrine is located at 〒030-0823 Aomori-ken, Aomori-shi, Hashimoto 2-7-8. Its major annual festival is on June 16.

== See also ==
*[[List of Shinto shrines in Japan]]

== External links ==

'''Uramachi Shinmeigū''' (浦町神明宮, ''Uramachi Shinmeigū'') is a [[Shinto]] shrine located in {{ill|Aomori|en|Aomori|WD=Q146790|lt=Aomori|1=Aomori}}, {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|en|Aomori Prefecture|WD=Q71699|lt=Aomori Prefecture|1=Aomori Prefecture}}, Japan. It enshrines three major [[kami]]: [[Amaterasu]] (天照大神), Omiyanome no kami (大宮能賣神), and [[Sarutahiko Ōkami]] (猿田彦神). The shrine is located at 〒030-0823 Aomori-ken, Aomori-shi, Hashimoto 2-7-8. Its major annual festival is on June 16.
